response.step_by_step_log: 1. Analyzed the video content and identified a concert setting. 2. Identified the vocal performance as "Stellar Stellar" by Hoshimachi Suisei, which starts at 03:52.000. 3. Used the search tool to find the lyrics for "Stellar Stellar" by Hoshimachi Suisei. 4. Provided the Japanese lyrics and an English translation. 5. Mapped the scenes: 00:00.000-03:52.000 as intro/instrumental and 03:52.000-04:59.000 as the vocal song performance.
response.global_summary: The video features footage of a concert by Hoshimachi Suisei, titled "SuperNova: REBOOT". It begins with an intro segment featuring audience members with penlights and instrumental music, followed by a vocal performance of the song "Stellar Stellar" from 03:52 onwards.

scenes.description: The concert begins with an introductory sequence. The audience is shown with penlights. Instrumental music is playing.
Hoshimachi Suisei performs 'Stellar Stellar' on stage while inside a stage carriage.

scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Because I'm a star, stellar stellar
Surely you already noticed
That thing I painted in the depths of my heart, is the cliché monologue I am about to tell
──There were words I could never say
There was a wall I couldn't break, all along
The scent of morning that suddenly rises
Is unbearable, hateful
I was shaking, hugging my knees in the corner of the room
I don't need the sun, so
Don't let it dawn──
I reach out my hand so it reaches someone
Because I'm not special, just the same as you
That's right, I sing to the night, stellar stellar
With all the radiance I have
Tonight, the music won't stop, ever ever
Yes, what I wanted to be all along
Is not the waiting Cinderella
But the prince going to pick her up
Because I'm a star
What a cliché story, really
Just a scene sleeping in the corner of a notebook, where I wrote only ideals
──Surely that star is also crying
Don't let tomorrow come──
I reach out my hand so it reaches someone
The things that are truly important, it seems they are invisible to the eye
That's right, I sing to the night, stellar stellar
Without thinking, just as I am
Tonight, the music will not stop, surely surely
Yes, what I wanted to be all along
Is not the fragile heroine
But the hero going to save her
A dreamy fairy tale
A fairy tale
That's right, I sing to the night, stellar stellar
With all the radiance I have
Tonight, the music won't stop, ever ever
That's right, I sing of love, stellar stellar
In the center of the world, of the universe
Tonight, the music will not stop, surely surely
Yes, what I wanted to be all along
Is not the waiting Cinderella
But the prince going to pick her up
Because I'm a star
Yes, I was a star
stellar stellar
